creator: robak@freebsd.org
text:
Koichiro,

I am quite confused - this PR 193887 is marked as a maintainer update and you yourself have uploaded a patch 'update to 20140926 obsoletes previous patch' (https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=147814) that is changing the maintainer address. I simply thought you want to change your maintainer address, and applied the patch just as you've provided it, without any modifications.

Kind regards,
Bartek Rutkowski
